name: Cory Mills
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $106,732 for Cory Mills in U.S. House, FL-07. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $106,732.
